_comment: Directional Google Ads Search benchmarks by industry. These are aggregated third-party averages, NOT guarantees, and should be refreshed periodically. avgCtr and avgCvr are fractions (0.061 = 6.1%); avgCpc and avgCpa are in the dataset currency (USD) unless a row sets its own 'currency' (e.g. the UK row uses GBP). The 'Heating & Boilers (UK)' row is directional UK home/trade-services data (boilers fall under home services).

source.label: LocaliQ / WordStream — Google Ads industry benchmarks (Search)
WordStream/LocaliQ — Home & Home Improvement (Search), converted to GBP

Heating & Boilers (UK).note: Directional UK home/trade-services figures — boilers sit under home services. Costs are illustrative GBP conversions, so treat them as a sanity check, not a target.
